== Notes for [[Item:Q85097|Q85097]] ==

'''Progenitor of Hashimiyya sub-sect of Kaysanite Shi'ism'''

'''5th Shia Kaysanite Imaam'''

* From Hudood-e-Kiraam of ???
* Wilaadat (Birth): c. 39 AH (c. 660 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 97 AH (716 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd-Allah_ibn_Muhammad_ibn_al-Hanafiyyah

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abu_Hashim

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hasan_ibn_Muhammad_ibn_al-Hanafiyyah

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_ibn_al-Hanafiyyah

Source 5: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaysanites_Shia

Source 6: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hashimiyya#History

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
